info.title: Vision API
info.description:
The Vision API is a computer vision product designed for churches. It uses camera-equipped devices to capture video of church services and events, then applies computer vision and machine learning to count attendees, identify returning visitors, and gather demographic information (age range, gender). This data helps church staff understand attendance trends, track guest retention, and make data-driven decisions about their ministry.

Key concepts:
- **Events** represent scheduled church services or gatherings that will be recorded.
- **Event Series** group recurring events (e.g., 'Sunday Morning Service') with scheduling rules.
- **Capture Sources** are camera/stream configurations on physical **Capture Devices**.
- **Capture Sessions** represent individual recording runs during events.
- **People** are unique individuals identified across events via face recognition.
- **Face Matches** link faces across events to track repeat attendance.
- **Credits** are consumed when processing video and must be purchased by admins.

Authentication: All endpoints require a Bearer token. Most endpoints require a staff user with specific Vision:* permissions. Credits endpoints require admin user authentication.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Church events that are recorded and analyzed. Events have a date range, timezone, and belong to a campus. They can optionally belong to a series and service time. Events become 'locked' once capture sessions are created, restricting what fields can be updated.

tags.name: EventSeries
tags.description: Groupings of recurring events (e.g., 'Sunday Morning Service'). Series can have scheduling rules and service times associated with them.

tags.name: EventSeriesRules
tags.description: Scheduling rules for event series. Each rule contains an event template with default parameters and an iCalendar RRULE for automatic event generation.

tags.name: EventServiceTimes
tags.description: Named service times within an event series (e.g., '9:00 AM Service', '11:00 AM Service'). Used to distinguish between multiple services on the same day.

tags.name: CaptureSources
tags.description: Camera or stream source configurations. Each source represents an RTSP video stream from a specific camera, with optional face/person detection regions and ONVIF camera control settings.

tags.name: CaptureDevices
tags.description: Physical hardware devices that connect to cameras and perform video capture. Devices are assigned to a customer account and can have multiple capture sources.

tags.name: CaptureSessions
tags.description: Individual video capture and processing runs. A capture session records from one source during one event. Sessions progress through statuses and are finalized after processing.

tags.name: People
tags.description: Unique individuals identified by the Vision system across multiple events. People are created automatically when new faces are detected and can be linked to existing individual records.

tags.name: Faces
tags.description: Individual face detections extracted from video frames. Each face belongs to a person track and has quality scores, bounding box coordinates, and an image.

tags.name: FaceMatches
tags.description: Cross-event face matching results. When a face in one event matches a face from another event, a face match record is created with a similarity score.

tags.name: GenderReviews
tags.description: Quality assurance for automated gender classification. The system's gender predictions can be reviewed by staff.

tags.name: EventAnnotations
tags.description: Custom metadata attached to events for contextual analysis (e.g., weather conditions, special occasions).

tags.name: EventAnnotationValues
tags.description: Specific values within an annotation type (e.g., under 'Weather': 'Sunny', 'Rainy').

tags.name: GeneratedVideos
tags.description: On-demand video exports with visual overlays showing detection results.

tags.name: Stats
tags.description: Aggregated attendance statistics and demographic analytics.

tags.name: Credits
tags.description: Credit management for video processing billing. Admin users only.

tags.name: Status
tags.description: System status information including counts of sessions still being processed.

get.description:
Search and filter events with pagination. Returns events with counted metrics. This endpoint uses the generic search system. In addition to the documented query parameters, you can filter on any field using filter operators: field=value (exact), field.eq=value, field.ne=value (not equal), field.lt/le/gt/ge=value (comparison), field.bt=start,end (between), field.in=val1&field.in=val2 (in list), field.nl=true (is null), field.like=%pattern% (pattern match).

Permission: Vision:ViewEvent

post.description:
Create a new church event.

Permission: Vision:CreateUpdateEvent

campusId.description: Campus ID. Must exist. Sources must match campus.

serviceTimeId.description: Optional service time. Requires seriesId. Must belong to that series.

autoCaptureStopDate.description: Required if autoCaptureStartDate set. Max 60 min after start.

sources.description: Required if autoCaptureStartDate set. Sources must be on same campus.

get.description:
Get event by ID. Includes computed 'locked' property.

Permission: Vision:ViewEvent

patch.description:
Update event. When locked, only 'name' can be changed. If seriesId changes without serviceTimeId, serviceTimeId is cleared.

Permission: Vision:CreateUpdateEvent

delete.description:
Delete event. Cannot delete locked events (returns 400).

Permission: Vision:CreateUpdateEvent

get.description:
Get detailed attendance stats for an event.

Permission: Vision:ViewEvent

Search series. This endpoint uses the generic search system. In addition to the documented query parameters, you can filter on any field using filter operators: field=value (exact), field.eq=value, field.ne=value (not equal), field.lt/le/gt/ge=value (comparison), field.bt=start,end (between), field.in=val1&field.in=val2 (in list), field.nl=true (is null), field.like=%pattern% (pattern match).

Auth: staff user

post.description:
Create series.

Permission: Vision:SetupEventSeries

get.description:
Get series. Supports _expand=rules and _expand=rules.campus.

Auth: staff user

Search event series rules. This endpoint uses the generic search system. In addition to the documented query parameters, you can filter on any field using filter operators: field=value (exact), field.eq=value, field.ne=value (not equal), field.lt/le/gt/ge=value (comparison), field.bt=start,end (between), field.in=val1&field.in=val2 (in list), field.nl=true (is null), field.like=%pattern% (pattern match).

Permission: Vision:SetupEventSeries

eventTemplate.description: Template with campusId, timezone, name, duration, sources, rrule.

get.description:
Get rule by ID.

Permission: Vision:SetupEventSeries

Search service times. This endpoint uses the generic search system. In addition to the documented query parameters, you can filter on any field using filter operators: field=value (exact), field.eq=value, field.ne=value (not equal), field.lt/le/gt/ge=value (comparison), field.bt=start,end (between), field.in=val1&field.in=val2 (in list), field.nl=true (is null), field.like=%pattern% (pattern match).

Auth: staff user

Permission: Vision:SetupEventSeries

get.description:

Auth: staff user

Search capture sources. This endpoint uses the generic search system. In addition to the documented query parameters, you can filter on any field using filter operators: field=value (exact), field.eq=value, field.ne=value (not equal), field.lt/le/gt/ge=value (comparison), field.bt=start,end (between), field.in=val1&field.in=val2 (in list), field.nl=true (is null), field.like=%pattern% (pattern match).

Auth: staff user

post.description:
Create camera source. ONVIF fields must all be provided together.

Permission: Vision:SetupSource

faceDetectionRegion.description: Face detection polygon. Min 4 points, closed, coords 0-1.

get.description:
Get source. Sensitive fields hidden by default.

Auth: staff user

patch.description:
Update source. Provided fields merged with existing before validation.

Permission: Vision:SetupSource

faceDetectionRegion.description: Face detection polygon. Min 4 points, closed, coords 0-1.

post.description:
Trigger device to capture snapshot from RTSP stream. No body required.

Permission: Vision:SetupSource

get.description:
List devices. Staff see assigned devices. Employees also see dev/unassigned devices.

Auth: staff user

Get device by ID.

Auth: staff user

Search capture sessions. This endpoint uses the generic search system. In addition to the documented query parameters, you can filter on any field using filter operators: field=value (exact), field.eq=value, field.ne=value (not equal), field.lt/le/gt/ge=value (comparison), field.bt=start,end (between), field.in=val1&field.in=val2 (in list), field.nl=true (is null), field.like=%pattern% (pattern match).

Permission: Vision:ViewEvent

Get sessions completed but still processing. Shows progress.

Auth: staff user

Create sessions and start recording. One session per sourceId. Async operation.

Permission: Vision:StartStopCapture

Stop active capture session.

Permission: Vision:StartStopCapture

get.description:
Get session by ID.

Permission: Vision:ViewEvent

Get detailed attendance stats for a capture session.

Permission: Vision:ViewEvent

Search person tracks in a session. This endpoint uses the generic search system. In addition to the documented query parameters, you can filter on any field using filter operators: field=value (exact), field.eq=value, field.ne=value (not equal), field.lt/le/gt/ge=value (comparison), field.bt=start,end (between), field.in=val1&field.in=val2 (in list), field.nl=true (is null), field.like=%pattern% (pattern match).

Permission: Vision:ViewEvent

Get track details. Returns up to 100 faces. Use afterFrameNumber for pagination. originalTrack=true returns original plus splits.

Auth: staff user

parameters.name: originalTrack
parameters.description: Return original track and all splits.

200.description: Track details. Array because originalTrack=true may return multiple.

get.description:
Compare consecutive indexed faces in a track for QA.

Permission: Vision:ViewEvent

post.description:
Split track into two at specified frame. Employee only.

Auth: employee only

200.description: Split done. Returns new right track.

put.description:
Update track reviewed status.

Auth: authenticated user

get.description:
Search identified people with stats. This endpoint uses the generic search system. In addition to the documented query parameters, you can filter on any field using filter operators: field=value (exact), field.eq=value, field.ne=value (not equal), field.lt/le/gt/ge=value (comparison), field.bt=start,end (between), field.in=val1&field.in=val2 (in list), field.nl=true (is null), field.like=%pattern% (pattern match).

Permission: Vision:ViewPeopleCatalog

parameters.name: _showFace
parameters.description: Include highest quality face for each person.

get.description:
Get person with linked individual if any.

Permission: Vision:ViewPeopleCatalog

post.description:
Link Vision person to church individual record.

Permission: Vision:LinkUnlinkIndividual

Remove link between person and individual.

Permission: Vision:LinkUnlinkIndividual

Merge 2+ person records into one. All data consolidated.

Permission: Vision:MergePeople

individualId.description: Optional: link merged person to individual.

get.description:
Search face detections. This endpoint uses the generic search system. In addition to the documented query parameters, you can filter on any field using filter operators: field=value (exact), field.eq=value, field.ne=value (not equal), field.lt/le/gt/ge=value (comparison), field.bt=start,end (between), field.in=val1&field.in=val2 (in list), field.nl=true (is null), field.like=%pattern% (pattern match).

Permission: Vision:ViewPeopleCatalog

Upload image to find matching faces via AWS Rekognition.

Permission: Vision:ViewPeopleCatalog

similarity.description: Map of indexed face IDs to similarity scores (0-100).

get.description:
Get face. details='all' includes related event, campus, person, track, session, source, face match.

Permission: Vision:ViewPeopleCatalog

Search cross-event face matches. NOT generic search system. Custom filtering by score category and review status. Includes deeply nested relations.

Permission: Vision:ViewFaceMatch

Get match by ID.

Permission: Vision:ViewFaceMatch

post.description:
Confirm match as same person.

Permission: Vision:MarkFaceMatch

Reject match as different people.

Permission: Vision:MarkFaceMatch

Mark as uncertain.

Permission: Vision:MarkFaceMatch

get.description:
Search gender reviews. NOT generic search. Custom filtering by confidence.

Permission: Vision:ViewGenderReview

Get review by ID.

Permission: Vision:ViewGenderReview

post.description:
Submit gender classification.

Permission: Vision:MarkGenderReview

get.description:
Search annotations. NOT generic search. Custom filters for event, series, campus, date range.

Auth: staff user

post.description:
Create event annotation with type/value and scope.

Permission: Vision:AnnotateEvent

valueId.description: Annotation value. Must belong to typeId.

target.description: Scope: event=single, date=all on date, date_series=all in series on date.

get.description:
Get annotation.

Auth: staff user

Search annotation types. This endpoint uses the generic search system. In addition to the documented query parameters, you can filter on any field using filter operators: field=value (exact), field.eq=value, field.ne=value (not equal), field.lt/le/gt/ge=value (comparison), field.bt=start,end (between), field.in=val1&field.in=val2 (in list), field.nl=true (is null), field.like=%pattern% (pattern match).

Auth: staff user

In addition to the documented query parameters, you can filter on any field using filter operators: field=value (exact), field.eq=value, field.ne=value (not equal), field.lt/le/gt/ge=value (comparison), field.bt=start,end (between), field.in=val1&field.in=val2 (in list), field.nl=true (is null), field.like=%pattern% (pattern match).

Search generated videos. This endpoint uses the generic search system. In addition to the documented query parameters, you can filter on any field using filter operators: field=value (exact), field.eq=value, field.ne=value (not equal), field.lt/le/gt/ge=value (comparison), field.bt=start,end (between), field.in=val1&field.in=val2 (in list), field.nl=true (is null), field.like=%pattern% (pattern match).

Permission: Vision:ViewGeneratedVideo

Get video by ID.

Permission: Vision:ViewGeneratedVideo

post.description:
Request video generation. Non-employees: only ExportCatalogedTracks with hideMetadata=true. ExportCatalogedTracks requires finalized session. Other types require completed processing job.

Permission: Vision:GenerateVideo

jobType.description: Visualization type. Non-employees restricted to ExportCatalogedTracks.

hideMetadata.description: Must be true for non-employee ExportCatalogedTracks.

get.description:
Attendance demographics by age range: <18, 18-22, 23-29, 30-35, 36-39, 40-49, 50-59, 60-69, 70+.

Permission: Vision:ViewDashboard

Attendance demographics by gender.

Permission: Vision:ViewDashboard

Attendance metrics as time series. Multiple metrics can be requested.

Permission: Vision:ViewDashboard

parameters.name: metric
parameters.description: One or more metrics. Pass multiple for multi-metric.

get.description:
Average attendance over date range. Typically use 'week' or 'isoWeek' aggregation.

Permission: Vision:ViewDashboard

Individual-level attendance records. Returns person details, face images, demographics, attendance status.

Permission: Vision:ViewDive

Current credit balance and usage forecast.

Auth: admin user

post.description:
Buy processing credits.

Auth: admin user

get.description:
Get auto-recharge configuration with payment method.

Auth: admin user

post.description:
Update auto-recharge. When active=true, threshold/numCredits/paymentMethod required.

Auth: admin user

get.description:
System status with count of unfinalized sessions.

Auth: staff user

totalUnfinalizedSessions.description: Sessions completed but still processing. 0 = all caught up.

bearerAuth.description: Authentication token. Include as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' header. Most Vision endpoints require a staff user with specific Vision:* permissions. Credits endpoints require an admin user.

SentResult.description: Response for async operations that have been queued.

DetectionRegionPoint.description: A point in a detection region polygon. Coordinates normalized 0.0-1.0 relative to video frame. Region must be a closed polygon with min 4 points.

BoundingBox.description: Rectangular bounding box for a detected face/person. Values normalized 0.0-1.0.

FaceSimilarity.description: Similarity measurements between two faces. Higher similarity/lower distance = more likely same person.

l2Distance.description: Euclidean distance between embeddings. Lower=more similar.

FaceComparison.description: Comparison between two consecutive indexed faces in a person track.

StatMetricType.description:
Attendance metric type.

- `everyone`: All detected people
- `counted`: People counted in attendance (passed all filters)
- `regulars`: Regular attendees
- `guests`: All guests (first-time + repeat)
- `firstTimeGuests`: First-time attendees
- `repeatGuests`: Guests who attended more than once but aren't regular
- `guestsRetained`: Guests who continued attending
- `guestsRetainedPct`: Percentage of guests retained
- `guestsNotRetained`: Guests who stopped attending
- `guestsNotRetainedPct`: Percentage not retained
- `conversions`: Guests who became regulars
- `resurrections`: Previously disappeared people who returned
- `disappearances`: Regulars who stopped attending

StatDateAggregation.description:
Time period granularity.
- `day`: Single calendar day
- `week`: Week starting Sunday
- `isoWeek`: ISO week starting Monday
- `month`: Calendar month
- `quarter`: Calendar quarter
- `year`: Calendar year

StatPivotField.description:
Dimension to break down data by.
- `series`: By event series
- `campus`: By campus
- `serviceTime`: By service time
- `source`: By capture source

MetricFilters.description: Active filters applied to a stats query.

VisionEvent.description: A church event that can be recorded and analyzed. Events represent specific occurrences. They belong to a campus and can optionally be part of a series with a service time. Once capture sessions exist, the event becomes 'locked' and most fields cannot be modified.

name.description: Display name. Must be non-empty. Only field updatable when locked.

campusId.description: Campus ID. Capture sources must belong to same campus.

seriesId.description: Event series ID, or null for standalone events. If changed during update without providing serviceTimeId, serviceTimeId is cleared.

serviceTimeId.description: Service time ID. Only settable when seriesId is set. Must belong to the specified series.

startDate.description: Start date/time in ISO 8601. Interpreted in event's timezone.

autoCaptureStartDate.description: Scheduled auto-capture start. Must be future for creates.

autoCaptureStopDate.description: Scheduled auto-capture stop. Required if autoCaptureStartDate set. Max 60 min after start.

test.description: Test event flag. Test events don't affect statistics.

locked.description: Read-only. True when capture sessions exist. When locked, only 'name' can be updated and event cannot be deleted.

counted.description: Number of people counted in attendance after all counting filters applied.

VisionEventSeries.description: A named grouping of recurring events. Can have scheduling rules and service times.

VisionEventSeriesRule.description: Scheduling rule with event template and iCalendar RRULE.

eventTemplate.description: Default parameters for generated events including campusId, timezone, name, duration, sources, and rrule.

VisionEventServiceTime.description: Named service time within a series (e.g., '9:00 AM Service'). Supports soft deletion.

VisionCaptureSource.description: Camera/stream source config. Sensitive fields (rtspUrl, rtspLiveStreamUrl, onvifPassword) hidden by default; pass showSensitive=true to include.

deviceId.description: Physical capture device this source connects to.

rtspUrl.description: RTSP recording URL. Sensitive field, hidden by default.

rtspLiveStreamUrl.description: RTSP live preview URL. Sensitive, hidden by default.

faceDetectionRegion.description: Face detection polygon (min 4 points, closed, coords 0-1). Null = entire frame.

personDetectionRegion.description: Person detection polygon. Null = entire frame.

onvifPort.description: ONVIF port. Required if onvifHost set.

onvifUsername.description: ONVIF username. Required if onvifHost set.

onvifPassword.description: ONVIF password. Sensitive, hidden by default. Required if onvifHost set.

VisionCaptureDevice.description: Physical capture hardware assigned to a customer.

customerId.description: Customer ID. Null for unassigned devices.

devDevice.description: Whether this is a dev/testing device.

VisionCaptureSession.description: A video capture and processing run. Progresses through statuses: created -> started -> capturing -> capturing_complete. After processing, finalized=true.

status.description:
Session status.
- created: Not started
- started: Command sent
- capturing: Actively recording
- capturing_preempted: Interrupted
- capturing_failed: Error occurred
- capturing_complete: Recording done

UnfinalizedSession.description: Capture session completed but still processing. Shows pipeline progress.

VisionFace.description: A face detection from a video frame. High-quality faces are indexed in AWS Rekognition for cross-event matching.

qualityScore.description: Face quality score. Higher = clearer, better for recognition.

indexedFaceId.description: AWS Rekognition face ID if indexed. Null if not indexed.

inferenceFaceId.description: Internal face ID from detection model.

VisionPerson.description: A unique individual identified across events. Can be linked to a church individual record via individualId.

PersonTrackInVideo.description: A person track in a capture session. Represents one person's movement through the camera field of view with face detections and demographic estimates.

splitFromInferenceTrackId.description: Original track ID if split. Null for originals.

notIndexedReasons.description: Why face not indexed. Empty = indexed.

totalFaces.description: Total faces (may exceed returned array due to pagination).

VisionFaceMatch.description: Cross-event face match. Scores: HIGH >= 96, BORDERLINE 90-95, LOW < 90.

VisionGenderReview.description: Gender classification review. Confidence: HIGH >= 96, MID 90-95, LOW < 90.

VisionEventAnnotation.description: Custom annotation on an event. Uses type/value system with configurable scope.

target.description: Scope: event=single event, date=all events on date, date_series=all events in series on date.

VisionEventAnnotationValue.description: Annotation value within a type (e.g., 'Sunny' under 'Weather'). Supports soft deletion.

VisionGeneratedVideo.description: Generated video export with detection overlays. Non-employees restricted to ExportCatalogedTracks with hideMetadata=true.

jobType.description:
Visualization type.
- DetectPeople: Person detection boxes
- DetectFaces: Face detection boxes
- TrackPeople: Person tracking with IDs
- MatchPeopleToFaces: People-to-face matching
- ExportCatalogedTracks: Clean export (only type for non-employees)

VisionVideoStats.description: Detailed attendance statistics broken down by minute with demographic data. Contains minute-by-minute counts plus aggregate demographic breakdowns by gender and age range.

VisionCreditForecast.description: Credit balance and usage forecast showing current balance, usage rate, and estimated exhaustion date.

Individual.description: Individual record from church people management system.

ageRange.description: Numeric range [min, max]. Max null for '70+'.

DiveResultPerson.description: Individual attendance record in dive results.

GenericSearchLimit.name: _limit
GenericSearchLimit.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

GenericSearchOffset.name: _offset
GenericSearchOffset.description: Number of records to skip before returning results. Use with _limit for pagination.

GenericSearchOrderBy.name: _orderBy
GenericSearchOrderBy.description: Sort order. Each value is 'field,ASC' or 'field,DESC'. Multiple allowed.

GenericSearchExpand.name: _expand
GenericSearchExpand.description: Relation names to include in response. Performs JOINs and nests related objects. Nested expansions use dot notation.

GenericSearchWithDeleted.name: _withDeleted
GenericSearchWithDeleted.description: When true, includes soft-deleted records in results.
